title: mimulus glabratus var. parviflorus
intro: Mimulus glabratus var. parviflorus, also known as dwarf monkey flower, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Phrymaceae family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, stress, and various emotional disorders. Traditionally, it is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving mood, and promoting relaxation due to its adaptogenic properties. Mimulus glabratus var. parviflorus can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
